commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Contempt. Hebrew, "prevarication. "Septuagint, "apostacy. "(Menochius)
Chozai means "seers. "(Septuagint) (Protestants) (Haydock)
But it more probably signifies some particular prophet, (Calmet) Isaias, (St. Jerome, Trad.) "Hanan "(Syriac) or "Saphan. "(Arabic version) (Calmet)
This work, less than the book of the kings of Israel, is now lost. (Menochius)
